currentElement.description: The name of the element which was active when this event was generated

toSystem.title: To System
toSystem.description: The system to which control is being transferred

messageReceived.title: Message Received
messageReceived.description: Present for message and postback received events

messageType.title: Message Type
messageType.description: The variety of message which was received (e.g. text, postback, media-upload)

slots.title: Slots

slotNames.title: Slot Names

referrerID.title: Referrer ID
referrerID.description: The ID of the referrer associated with the conversation to which this interaction belongs
